title: Ambition Review
description: Review personal vision, goals, and early portfolio identity artifacts at the 40-hour gate.

title: Market Understanding Review
description: Demonstrate market intelligence, client discovery progress, and financial literacy foundations.

title: Business Operations Review
description: Validate advisor startup blueprint, risk awareness, and operational readiness.

title: Licensing Readiness Review
description: Confirm professional standards, compliance posture, and licensing preparation.

title: Proof of Concept Venture Board
description: Present proof-of-concept venture to faculty and mentors for Segment 1 capstone evaluation.
